plan_metadata.name: General Teams Agent Azure OpenAI ts Copilot Remote Debug

steps.description: Click the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" popup within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "General Teams Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" prompt in Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click the "Default folder (/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects)" option in the "Workspace Folder" selection dialog of Visual Studio Code.
